name: Structured Index Advantage

data_sources.note: Transamerica Structured Index Advantage RILA. Issued by Transamerica Life Insurance Company. New variant with optional income features announced Q4 2025.

Surrender schedule 8/8/7/6/5/4 over 6 years (corrected from synthetic 6/5/4/3/2/1). No annual contract or admin fees (me_fee corrected 0.0125 -> 0.0). Three free waivers: nursing-home / hospital confinement (180+ days), terminal illness, unemployment (involuntary). 10% free withdrawal of contract value annually.
Transamerica RILA disclosures hub. Confirms cap / participation / trigger crediting methods; rates updated periodically.
Transamerica Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A (Excellent). Synthetic anchor 'A' confirmed. (Aegon parent; not PE.)

verification_notes: Surrender schedule corrected (synthetic 6/5/4/3/2/1 -> prospectus 8/8/7/6/5/4); M&E fee corrected (synthetic 0.0125 -> 0.0 — Transamerica RILA has no annual contract/admin fee); AM Best A confirmed; disability_waiver flipped to true (unemployment waiver is the closest match in Transamerica's three free waivers).
